Subject: Vivente transition\n\nBody: Hi Siddhi, I have tried to update my web address back to my old domain but it seems to be over ridden by Zoca. How do I fix this? Regards Kim
I haven’t changed my decision with regards to discontining subscription.   Please start the process for  opting out.
Hey Kim! I hope you’re well:) I completely respect your decision and will inform my management about the same!
Hey Kim just allow me 5 mins I’m joining the call
And here’s the link for the meeting!  Kim Lohmann X Zoca | Check In November Google Meet joining info Video call link: https://meet.google.com/fgi-udvb-ouk
I received the link for 6pm .  I am ready from now on
Or Thur 13th 6.30
Hey Kim!  I hope you’re well. Sorry for the delayed response. I’m going to set up a meeting for tomorrow around 6:30pm your time:)
I am available now
I have 5.30 Bris time tonight?
I sent both website contact and email to Siddhi re: discontinuing service agreement but have not had any response yet.
Hey Kim! This is Sid - do you have sometime tomorrow so I could help you out with the process
